content.cn_text: 第二部分。
content.en_text: Section 2.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一名男子向一群听众介绍一个慈善机构。
content.en_text: You will hear a man introducing a charity to a group of listeners.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看第11至16题。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 11 to 16.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第11至16题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 11 to 16.

content.cn_text: 大家好，感谢大家参加今晚的活动。
content.en_text: Hello everyone, thanks for attending tonight's event.

content.cn_text: 我先从我们慈善机构 Eyesaver 的早期历史讲起。
content.en_text: Let me start with the early history of our charity, Eyesaver.

content.cn_text: Eyesaver 由退休验光师 Timothy Gaines 创立。
content.en_text: Eyesaver was founded by retired optometrist Timothy Gaines.

content.cn_text: 我的大部分职业生涯都在 Eyesaver 度过。
content.en_text: I have spent much of my working life at Eyesaver.

content.cn_text: 我现在60岁，我是在15年前离开
content.en_text: I am 60 years old now and I started working for this organisation 15 years ago when I left

content.cn_text: 企业职位后开始为这个机构工作，帮助有眼部问题的人。
content.en_text: a corporate position to help people with eye problems.

content.cn_text: 现在，我们的慈善机构已经帮助人们三十年了。
content.en_text: Now our charity has been helping people for three decades.

content.cn_text: 你们可能知道，我们现在还在做各种其他事情来帮助有眼部问题的人。
content.en_text: You may know that we are now doing various other things to help people with eye problems.

content.cn_text: 这包括为患有眼疾的儿童提供药物，以及为
content.en_text: That includes medications for children with eye diseases and operational help to those

content.cn_text: 有眼部问题的公众提供手术帮助。
content.en_text: in the public who have eye problems.

content.cn_text: 但当 Gaines 先生刚创立 Eyesaver 时，他希望这个项目能够提供
content.en_text: But when Mr Gaines just founded Eyesaver, he wanted the programme to be able to offer

content.cn_text: 常见眼部设备给需要的人。
content.en_text: common eye equipment to those who needed it.

content.cn_text: 我们偶尔会收到来自公司和慈善团体的捐款。
content.en_text: We receive occasional donations from corporations and charity groups.

content.cn_text: 现在我们有超过1500名志愿者在街上拿着小红捐款
content.en_text: Now we have over 1,500 volunteers who work on the streets with the little red donation

content.cn_text: 箱工作，你们很多人都很熟悉这些捐款箱，而这是我们的主要资金来源。
content.en_text: boxes which many of you are familiar with and this is the main source of funding for

content.cn_text: 我们的资金主要来自这里。
content.en_text: us.

content.cn_text: 此外，我们正计划努力争取来自富有赞助人的捐款。
content.en_text: Besides, we are planning to work to secure donations from wealthy benefactors.

content.cn_text: 许多人热心慈善事业，并一直询问如何向我们
content.en_text: Many people are passionate about charity causes and have been inquiring how to donate money

content.cn_text: 捐款。
content.en_text: to us.

content.cn_text: 我真的很感激。
content.en_text: I really appreciate that.

content.cn_text: 但我们最主要的需求是为患者收集眼镜。
content.en_text: But our main need is to collect glasses for our patients.

content.cn_text: 你们很多人手里都有好几副旧眼镜，我们鼓励你们
content.en_text: Many of you have multiple pairs of old glasses in your possession and we encourage you to

content.cn_text: 把这些不再需要的眼镜收集起来，捐给我们的事业。
content.en_text: gather these pairs which you no longer need and donate them to our cause.

content.cn_text: 这样做，你们就能确保别人能看得更清楚。
content.en_text: In doing this, you'll be able to make sure that someone else can see better.

content.cn_text: 我们大多数人无法想象看不清楚的生活。
content.en_text: Most of us cannot imagine a life in which we are unable to see well.

content.cn_text: 这就是为什么你们捐赠眼镜对我们的使命如此重要。另外顺便说一句，
content.en_text: This is why your eyeglass donations are so critical to our mission and, as a side note,

content.cn_text: 我们提供全职职位，如果你感兴趣可以告诉我。
content.en_text: we offer full-time positions let me know if you are interested.

content.cn_text: 我们的目标是让人们意识到，即使是最小的捐赠，也能帮助改变
content.en_text: Our goal is to make people aware that even the smallest of donations can help change

content.cn_text: 一个人的生活。
content.en_text: a person's life.

content.cn_text: 所以你的捐赠可能会成为他们人生的转折点。
content.en_text: So your donation can be a turning point for them.

content.cn_text: 前几天，当我在街上和一些人交谈时，他们惊讶地发现
content.en_text: The other day, when I was talking to some people on the street, they were surprised to find

content.cn_text: 有些眼部问题是多么容易治愈。
content.en_text: out how easily some eye problems can be cured.

content.cn_text: 我很自豪地说，我们下一个项目将旨在教育人们了解常见的眼部
content.en_text: And I am proud to say that our next program will aim at educating people about common eye

content.cn_text: 疾病。
content.en_text: diseases.

content.cn_text: 我们能够预防许多严重的眼部问题。
content.en_text: We are able to prevent many fatal eye problems.

content.cn_text: 为了宣传我们的慈善项目，我们当然需要做一些广告。
content.en_text: In order to publicise our charity program, we surely need to do some advertising.

content.cn_text: 我们刚开始这个项目时，使用电脑来提高人们对我们事业的认识。
content.en_text: When we first started our program, we used computers to create awareness for our cause.

content.cn_text: 例如，宣传研讨会，在研讨会上我们告诉人们他们如何帮助
content.en_text: For instance, promoting seminars in which we informed people as to how they could help

content.cn_text: 我们解决眼部问题。
content.en_text: us to solve eye problems.

content.cn_text: 但近年来，我们宣传项目的主要方式是通过音频录音。
content.en_text: But in recent years, the main means of advertising our program is through audio recordings.

content.cn_text: 我们发现这种方式成本效益高且有效。
content.en_text: We have found it cost-efficient and effective.

content.cn_text: 很高兴知道我们的许多员工正在向他们的朋友
content.en_text: It's good to know that many of our staff are recommending our program to their friends

content.cn_text: 和同事推荐我们的项目。
content.en_text: and colleagues.

content.cn_text: 但恐怕我们的培训无法向人们展示我们项目的全貌。
content.en_text: But I am afraid that our training cannot show people the whole picture of our program.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余讲话之前，你有一些时间查看第17至20题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the talk, you have some time to look at questions 17-20.

content.cn_text: 现在请听，并回答第17至20题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 17-20.

content.cn_text: 最后，我想向大家介绍一些在 Eyesaver 的发展和成功中发挥重要
content.en_text: Finally, I would like to tell you about some organisations which have played important

content.cn_text: 作用的组织。
content.en_text: roles in the development and success of Eyesaver.

content.cn_text: 我们与National Vision Funding Group 的合作让我们获得了知名度，
content.en_text: Our affiliation with the National Vision Funding Group has allowed us to gain fame and

content.cn_text: 并变得更加重要。
content.en_text: to become even more significant.

content.cn_text: 因此全国各地有许多人来寻求我们的服务。
content.en_text: So many people around the country are coming for our services.

content.cn_text: 我们与Eye for the Future 组织的合作，使我们能够投放合作广告，通过这些广告
content.en_text: Our association with the Eye for the Future organisation has allowed us to run cooperative ads by which

content.cn_text: 我们寻找愿意与我们合作的设备生产商。
content.en_text: we seek producers of equipment to work with us.

content.cn_text: 同时，我们的一些员工被派往该组织接受特殊培训。
content.en_text: Meanwhile, some of our staff has been sent to this organisation for some special training.

content.cn_text: 他们的技能应该很快会得到提升。
content.en_text: Their skills should be improved very soon.

content.cn_text: 此外，我们还与Sam's Eyecare Institution 有长期合作。
content.en_text: Also, we have had a long time co-operation with Sam's Eyecare Institution.

content.cn_text: 我们与它的关系让我们有机会与许多不同的学术
content.en_text: Our relationship with it has given us the opportunity to link with many different academic

content.cn_text: 机构建立联系，包括声誉良好的学院和大学。
content.en_text: institutions, including colleges and universities with good reputation.

content.cn_text: 我们还与一个名为Youth Health 的团体有类似的友好关系。
content.en_text: And we have a similar friendship with a group called Youth Health.

content.cn_text: 我们与该团体的联系使我们能够直接接触小孩子，因为这
content.en_text: Our connection with that group allows us to link directly with young kids since this

content.cn_text: 是他们成长中的关键阶段。
content.en_text: is a crucial stage in their growth.

content.cn_text: 我们计划联系一些学院，并希望在它们的帮助下，更多大学生
content.en_text: We plan to contact with some colleges and hope that with their help more college students

content.cn_text: 能够了解我们的项目。
content.en_text: could get to know our programme.

content.cn_text: 所以正如你们所见，我们在联系学生方面已经覆盖了所有基础，因为我们
content.en_text: So as you can see, we have all bases covered in linking with students as we have affiliations

content.cn_text: 同时直接联系了管理人员和学生本人。
content.en_text: directly with both administrators and the students themselves.

content.cn_text: 非常感谢大家今天的聆听。
content.en_text: Thank you so much for your attention today.

content.cn_text: 在我们努力消除眼部问题的过程中，无论你们的捐赠
content.en_text: As we try to stamp out eye problems, we will appreciate your donations no matter how

content.cn_text: 多少，我们都会非常感激。
content.en_text: large or how small.

content.cn_text: 我们相信，通过我们的努力，世界会更加明亮、更加美好。
content.en_text: We believe, with our efforts, the world will be brighter and more beautiful.

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。
content.en_text: That's the end of section 2.

content.cn_text: 现在你有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: You now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 现在翻到第三部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section 3.

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B, or C.
groups.title: Questions 11–16

items.title: When was Eyesaver founded?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第11题问 Eyesaver 什么时候成立，原文说 has been helping people for three decades，即 30 years ago，因此答案是 B。

items.title: What was the original aim of the program?

options.title: B
options.content: to offer medication to children with eye diseases

options.title: C
options.content: to offer operational help to people who had eye problems

items.analysis: 答案解析：第12题问项目最初目标是什么，原文说 offer common eye equipment，对应 A。

items.title: The main funding comes from
items.analysis: 答案解析：第13题问主要资金来自哪里，原文说 volunteers work on the streets with donation boxes, this is the main source of funding，对应 C “money collected on the street”。

items.title: What does the speaker expect listeners to provide?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第14题问说话人希望听众提供什么，原文说 main need is to collect glasses，因此答案是 A。

items.title: What is the main purpose of this program?

options.title: A
options.content: to show people their donation can make a difference

options.title: B
options.content: to show people how easily eye problems can be cured

options.title: C
options.content: to educate people about common eye diseases

items.analysis: 答案解析：第15题问该项目的主要目的是什么，原文说 make people aware that even the smallest donations can help change a person’s life，对应 A “their donation can make a difference”。

items.title: Eyesaver advertises for the program through
items.analysis: 答案解析：第16题问 Eyesaver 通过什么宣传该项目，原文说 main means... through audio recordings，因此答案是 B。

groups.desc: Write the correct letter, A–F, next to Question 17–20.
groups.title: Questions 17–20

list.title: E
list.content: take the reputation to a higher level

items.title: National Vision Funding Group
items.analysis: 答案解析：第17题问 National Vision Funding Group 的作用，原文说 allowed us to gain fame and become more significant，对应 E “take the reputation to a higher level”。

items.title: Eye for the Future
items.analysis: 答案解析：第18题问 Eye for the Future 的作用，原文说 seek producers of equipment to work with us，对应 D “help look for equipment manufacturers”。

items.title: Sam's Eyecare Institution
items.analysis: 答案解析：第19题问 Sam's Eyecare Institution 的作用，原文说 link with academic institutions, including colleges and universities，对应 C “earn support from colleges”。

items.title: Youth Health
items.analysis: 答案解析：第20题问 Youth Health 的作用，原文说 link directly with young kids，对应 B “involve more children in need”。
